title: 2025/2026 First Semester Resumption Date
content: All academic and non-academic staff are to resume for the 2025/2026 first semester on the date fixed by Management. Departments should ensure lecture timetables are updated in the directory.
author: Registrar's Office

title: Staff Verification Exercise
content: All staff are required to update their bio-data and departmental records in the Staff Directory Information System ahead of the annual verification exercise.
author: Human Resources Unit

title: Promotion Interview Schedule Released
content: The schedule for the 2025 promotion interviews for eligible academic staff has been released. Affected departments should check with their Deans for timelines.
author: Registrar's Office

title: New Staff Orientation Programme
content: Newly employed staff across all schools are invited to a one-day orientation programme covering institutional policies and the staff directory system.
author: Human Resources Unit

title: ICT Directorate System Maintenance Notice
content: The Staff Directory Information System will undergo routine maintenance. Staff are advised to save pending changes before the scheduled window.
author: ICT Directorate
